overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage from Assassin's Creed Origins depicting a boat journey around the Lighthouse of Alexandria. The camera circles the ancient monument before sailing past into open water, eventually approaching a distant rocky coastline with classical architecture and mountains.

events.description: boat begins circling around the lighthouse island, changing viewing angle

agents.ego_description: navigating a sailboat toward the lighthouse island, observing the ancient structure from the water

notable_agents.action: small sailboat with tan sail passing by the lighthouse island

entered.detail: ancient stone lighthouse with white facade and red accents, beacon fire smoking at top
smaller stone structures surrounding the tower base with red roof accents
rocky outcrops at water level around the island base
scattered palm trees growing on the island around the lighthouse
wooden mast and ropes of the player's vessel visible in foreground

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view of the Lighthouse of Alexandria from a boat approaching the island. The camera circles the ancient stone structure, revealing its white facade with red accents and the smoking beacon at the top. Palm trees dot the rocky island shoreline as the boat maneuvers around the monument.

scene_state.functional_zone: open harbor water transitioning to open sea

events.description: boat passes the lighthouse, view opens to open sea with scattered vessels
camera pans right following the boat's movement past the island

agents.ego_description: sailing past the lighthouse island, the boat's rigging and sail become visible in frame

notable_agents.action: wooden sailing vessel with distinctive red sail passing close by on the right side

entered.detail: passing ship with distinctive red sail and wooden hull

segments.scene_description: The boat sails past the lighthouse, which moves to the left and exits the frame as the view opens to the open sea. A distinctive red-sailed vessel passes by on the right. The camera pans right, transitioning from the enclosed harbor to the expansive Mediterranean.

scene_state.functional_zone: open Mediterranean sea with scattered shipping

events.description: multiple merchant vessels with tan sails appear scattered across the horizon
distant coastline with mountains becomes visible on the right horizon

agents.ego_description: sailing across open water, passing other merchant vessels with tan sails

entered.detail: multiple sailing vessels with tan sails scattered across the horizon
hazy shoreline with mountains becoming visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The boat sails through open waters with multiple merchant vessels visible on the horizon. The lighthouse island fades into the distance as a new coastline with mountains becomes visible ahead. The camera continues panning right, revealing the approaching shore.

events.description: approaching rocky coastline with ancient buildings and cliffs

agents.ego_description: sailing along the rocky coastline, approaching a settlement with classical architecture and mountains in the background

entered.detail: tall rocky cliffs with sparse vegetation and waves lapping at the base
stone buildings with classical architecture and red roofs on the cliff top
mountain range visible behind the coastline under the cloudy sky
scattered green trees growing on the rocky shore and cliff edges

segments.scene_description: The boat approaches a rocky coastline with tall cliffs and classical stone buildings perched above. The camera reveals mountains in the background as the vessel sails along the shore. The boat's rigging shifts from left to right as the camera completes its pan, showing the detailed rocky terrain and coastal vegetation.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins with an intimate approach to a monumental landmark and expands into a wide vista of the open sea. It begins by circling the Lighthouse of Alexandria from a boat, revealing the white stone facade, red accents, and the smoking beacon atop the structure as it passes palm trees along the rocky shoreline. As the boat maneuvers further, the lighthouse gradually shifts to the left and exits the frame, opening the view to the expansive Mediterranean. The scene then transitions from the enclosed harbor to the open water, panning right to follow a distinctive red-sailed vessel passing by.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the open sea toward a rugged, mountainous coastline. It begins with the boat sailing through wide waters as the lighthouse island fades into the distance and merchant vessels linger on the horizon. As the camera pans right, the open sea gives way to a distant shore, bringing a range of towering mountains into view. The scene then shifts toward the rocky coastline, where the vessel glides past steep cliffs topped with classical stone buildings. Finally, the camera completes its sweep across the detailed rocky terrain and coastal vegetation, with the boat's rigging shifting across the frame as it hugs the shore.
